shadows.name: flow-glow
shadows.purpose: Animated mark and primary-focus emphasis only.

motion.name: flow-stream
motion.purpose: The Pinkflow mark's path animation; disabled for reduced motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action on a product or pricing surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; min-height:44px; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:12px 18px; border-radius:8px; background:#ff4da6; color:#120d1a; font:800 14px 'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; text-decoration:none; transition:background 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#ff70b8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #fff; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Product Status
components.description: Text-first lifecycle status for a Pinkflow product.
components.css: .ds-status { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; padding:5px 9px; border-radius:999px; background:rgba(255,77,166,.12); color:#ff9dcc; font:700 12px 'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; }

components.name: Product Panel
components.description: A product-shaped surface containing status, outcome, price unit, and destination.
components.css: .ds-product { max-width:420px; padding:24px; border:1px solid rgba(255,77,166,.18); border-radius:12px; background:#1a1226; color:#fff; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-product h3 { margin:0 0 8px; font-size:24px; } .ds-product p { margin:0; color:#b9b3c1; line-height:1.6; }

narrative.overview: A product-led company site where current products, real price tags, and support ownership are immediately visible.

rules.name: Price Beside Product
rules.body: Keep the unit and dollar meaning beside every commercial offer.

rules.name: Tonal Depth
rules.body: Use layered surfaces before reaching for shadows.

donts: Do not fabricate scale or customer proof.
Do not blur product-specific data contracts.
Do not use gradient text or decorative terminal cosplay.
